textByHash.b44c458b164d5b993d221ae6a0424ba6326a34f0: I not be in the mood t' talk, sorry. If ye need anythin', talk to Cap'ain Pudi over by the dock.
textByHash.2f47d101b4f9116a67308d2a736bacbdb27d2a1f: I cannot believe that beast ruined me ship.
textByHash.e5d03138ce832a7d26786f3a38c678e6c4e74545: Was awful, me crew an' I were out on our fortnightly fishin' excursion. We set sail from Al Kharid t' the deep-sea fishin' spot we usually use.
textByHash.f6684f66b705d363ef6939059b2cdb5a0db186fb: Was nothin' but smooth sailin' all the way, we got t' the spot an' started fishin'.
textByHash.085b7bb684ef9719f197a64db9002bb7fdf7fc1f: Aye, I s'pose it was. After a few days, the crew an' I sailed further t' the Karamjan coast t' catch some sharks. More plunder from sellin' sharks.
textByHash.685e686ab556a623eef102fcfaf48e13bb83c834: While sailin', I noticed there was more debris than usual. Koanee said there must have been a storm recently.
textByHash.381e81cc4ef4afe12fce85a5e97a07435bceb87f: Koanee is in charge of plottin' a course t' our destination an' watchin' the weather. I thought she was good at her job.
textByHash.003b435202abbcf0b814666726b272c3bc043370: We got to our final fishin' spot an' Lauretta let down the net. Almost a whole day went by an' we still 'ad not caught any fish.
textByHash.68ce0766b8f7c3cb7f134ef9d5f9a9ad91dfa046: In fact, I could not see any fish in the waters at all. Such a strange sight.
textByHash.d2a33fecf6e29364e06fed3a49be62086771bbe1: Nothin'. We decided t' pack it in for the day an' I told Koanee t' leave the nets down, hoping we would catch some fish overnight.
textByHash.e1cad60bed81eac18bc543f70aea2aa2642f71df: 'Twas a risk we 'ad to take t' catch some fish.
textByHash.a86e895cab56b0096f87ec7a0adbc05d4719e705: The next day Koanee woke me up t' tell me a storm was on the horizon, so we lifted the anchor up an' adjusted our course.
textByHash.0756cba5e9e20b36fcdc23f08afd60b9ef38342b: Not sure what she was playing at with that decision, but out o' nowhere winds started t' change an' the storm was headin' in our direction, we couldn't outrun it.
textByHash.043e59ac7edf320ea00ad1cbaeba8a94c026d9cc: 'Twas also too dangerous to anchor down, so we 'ad to weather it.
textByHash.a958638a4dfd5884b066aa006f285ae1a54db012: Thick fog rolled in, giant waves crashin' against the ship's hull. So much lightnin', it felt like Saradomin was angry with us.
textByHash.f759b981851760ff6e18853b7ac66250865bb32d: The lightnin' struck our sails, settin' them ablaze despite the 'eavy rain!
textByHash.ffc6422655387fa321b4df7fb206f7534cdddcab: The last thing I see is glowin' fish an' a monster in the distance with a twisted face. Next thing I know, I'm lying on the shore just south of Al Kharid with Pudi waving a kebab in me face!
textByHash.f873def2b52b0456efd87b696cfae34a44f49a73: Aye, we survived, but the same cannot be said for me poor ship! Koanee should 'o known better!
textByHash.794b5dbdf5643c7df5506c0ebd2f3ba21d0a5ff3: Once Pudi and the others helped us back on our feet, the Chancellor sent us 'ere t' setup shop and recruit others.
textByHash.5a03de644df9e74c7e3275f5dc8827722945b2a5: Not really my area of expertise, mind, but Pudi sorts most of it out!
textByHash.12f0db89698af7254692e71c49696f07af039b37: Anythin' else I can help ye with?
textByHash.306b777d6f1593d7342a2d894a98e5e828197086: Always carry an 'ammer. That beast has a habit of destroyin' ships. You can fix it up by using said 'ammer.
textByHash.43b7cbe0f25e490d095570f0feefeb6adea9c851: The Spirit Anglers' ships you fight the beast from are kitted out with everythin' ye need.
textByHash.08de2c90747b7dad0c53cccdcfdc66f2933432ef: Can I help ye with anythin' else?
textByHash.36428c16775c00cd1f4d21fed6e1df777012e0fe: Ye be stealin' me booty are ye?
textByHash.25d05586bff2f3bc447a0f720585354e3cf8800e: I be yankin' ye chain, 'tis all good. I put that 'ere book on that shelf so I may spread me tale.
textByHash.5aa21d43e2a125ba49c2b298e52bbd02b011ea9c: Of course 'tis true! Ye can ask me all about it.
textByHash.6ef6ef6066a98ba7ca632779aec87693e824c768: Um... no, I don't want your damp egg, thanks...
textByHash.e6cf6081e267e16187cf51709d0996c2287c0445: This is some comfort to be sure.
